title: ANC - UI
scenario: Default ANC/Adaptive is ON while Transparency/Environment is OFF and disabled/greyed out
steps: 2. Observe the default state of the ANC (Active Noise Cancellation) section.
3. Verify that ANC/Adaptive is set to ON by default.
5. Verify that Transparency/Environment is set to OFF by default.
6. Check that all values in the Transparency section are disabled/greyed out.
7. Confirm the ANC section displays the Adaptive option with description: 'Automatically adjusts to provide the best ANC experience.'
8. Confirm the ANC section displays the Standard option with description: 'Provide a more natural audio experience and enhanced sidetone comfort.'
9. Confirm the Transparency section displays the Environment option with description: 'Optimized to hear your surroundings.'
10. Confirm the Transparency section displays the Speech option with description: 'Best for face-to-face communication.'
expected: Default state: ANC/Adaptive is ON. Transparency/Environment is OFF with all values disabled/greyed out. ANC section shows Adaptive and Standard options with correct descriptions. Transparency section shows Environment and Speech options with correct descriptions.
